headline: Hospital-Acquired Infections Affect 14,000 Patients in Public Hospitals
context: MOH surveillance data for 2025 shows 14,000 patients contracted infections during hospital stays.

cards.big: 14,000 patients contracted infections while being treated in government hospitals in 2025
cards.sub: Hospital-acquired infections add average 12 extra bed days per affected patient

cards.big: Hand hygiene compliance among healthcare workers averages 52% in MOH audits
cards.sub: WHO standard requires minimum 80% compliance to prevent infection transmission

cards.big: HAI treatment costs RM280 million annually and contributes to 1,400 excess deaths
cards.sub: Preventable infections drain resources that could treat other patients

cards.big: Denmark reduced HAI rates 45% through mandatory public reporting of hospital infection data
cards.sub: Transparency and accountability created institutional incentive for improvement

cards.big: Patients should not fear getting sicker from the hospital that is supposed to heal them
Should public hospitals be required to publish their infection rates for patient comparison
